name: Financial Vehicle Corporations
description_short: Balance sheet statistics for financial vehicle corporations (FVCs) engaged in securitisation transactions in the euro area, covering assets and liabilities by type of securitised loan, originator sector, and investor.
use_cases: What is the total size of euro area securitisation vehicles?
Which asset classes are being securitised by euro area FVCs?
Which banking sectors are the largest originators of securitised loans?
How has the euro area securitisation market evolved since 2008?
